H10a.prediction: Spearman rho > 0.5 between Bloom level and effective rank

H10b.prediction: Bloom main effect significant (p<0.01), independent of domain

H10d.prediction: Bloom level predicts Campaign 1 effect sizes (rho > 0.4)

H10e.prediction: k-means separates low/high Bloom with > 70% accuracy
